name: Skardin Industrial Corporation
summary: Skardin Industrial Corporation, a consumer electronics manufacturing company, manufactures, supplies, and exports set top box and broadband industry solutions in Taiwan and internationally. It offers STB platforms, smart home products, WIFI speakers, hybrid soundbase and sound bar audio systems, and software/middleware products. The company also provides electronics manufacturing services. Skardin Industrial Corporation was founded in 1982 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
